political.s: FEC: $34K PAC donations; 34% to Republican, 66% to Democratic committees.

wiki.extract: Paramount+ is an American subscription video on-demand over-the-top streaming service owned by Paramount Skydance. The service's content is drawn primarily from the libraries of various properties owned by Paramount Skydance, such as CBS, Nickelodeon, MTV, Comedy Central, BET, the Smithsonian Channel, Showtime, and Paramount Pictures. It also shows original series and films, live streaming sports coverage, and in the United States, live streaming of local CBS television stations. Paramount+ was originally launched on October 28, 2014, by CBS Corporation as CBS All Access in the United States,

sampleRecords.nature: Severe wounds or internal injuries and soft tissue injuries
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A stunt performer was riding a horse when the prop scabbard on his belt contacted the horse's flank area, causing the horse to hop twice. While the horse was hopping, the employee slipped forward in the saddle and his pelvis contacted the saddle near the horn. The employee was hospitalized with internal bleeding and a separated pelvis and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was on an extension ladder while painting at a jobsite. The ladder slipped, causing the employee to fall to the floor and sustain injuries to their left elbow and left knee.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee and a co-worker were laying nets for compost. The employee's left hand was on a gear for the compost conveyor when the machine started, resulting in fingertip amputations of the ring and middle fingers.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A lighting technician was focusing and programing lights on a stage when they fell off a 4-foot high stage, fracturing their arm and hip on the ground.
An employee was driving a utility vehicle when it tipped over. The employee sustained a left ear laceration, a headache, teeth and tailbone injuries, and blunt force trauma.
